name: Snow Pea and Red Pepper Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove strings and tops from snow peas.
2. Blanch for 1 minute in boiling water, then drain immediately.
3. Plunge into ice water to make them crisp, then drain again and dry.
4. Slice mushrooms.
5. Dice peppers into small pieces.
6. In a bowl or blender, combine garlic, vinegar, lemon juice, sugar, salt, and pepper.
7. Slowly add oil in a stream while continuing to mix until well combined.
8. Toss the veggies together.
9. Just before serving, toss in sesame seeds (if using) and combine with the dressing and vegetables.
